title: The Prediction
visual: Premature post-mortem invite forecasting a failure that has not yet occurred.
keyEvents: Calendar invite titled Post-Mortem: Feature Failure
Tension enters the grid before any failure

characterArcs.Oedi: Begins sensing future fracture rather than decoding mystery.
characterArcs.Bianca: Maintains calm observation without reactive interpretation.
characterArcs.Milo: Frames temporal glitch as playful paradox.
characterArcs.Felix: Checks logs; confirms nothing broken yet.

title: Latency
visual: Psychological lag in Zoom calls; pauses stretch longer than network delay.
keyEvents: Minor bug triggers disproportionate emotional reaction

title: The Fracture
visual: Launch slowdown at 14:49; system slows but does not crash.
keyEvents: Single onboarding flow isolated and patched

characterArcs.Oedi: Moves from observer to decision anchor.

title: The Quiet Rebuild
visual: Post-crisis softness; annotated timeline and simplified onboarding design.

characterArcs.Max: Shifts from absurdity to elegant clarity.

title: The External Shock
visual: Corporate restructuring email introduces real institutional pressure.

characterArcs.Oedi: Stops decoding system; begins shaping it.
characterArcs.Milo: Asks vulnerable question about team continuity.
characterArcs.Felix: Anchors team with reminder: We shipped.
characterArcs.Lena: Shows strategic transparency under real stakes.
characterArcs.Max: Balances design clarity with emotional honesty.
